header.title: Word Frequency Counter — Find Most Common Words & Phrases
header.description: Free online word frequency counter to analyze word and phrase occurrences in your content. Identify the most common words, detect overused terms, and discover keyword opportunities for SEO optimization. Supports single words, 2-word phrases, and 3-word phrases. Perfect for content writers and SEO specialists.
header.keywords: word frequency counter, word occurrence counter, most common words, keyword frequency, phrase frequency, seo word analysis

items.question: What is word frequency analysis?
items.answer: Word frequency analysis counts how often each word appears in your text, helping identify overused terms, keyword stuffing, and content focus areas.

items.question: How can word frequency help SEO?
items.answer: It helps you balance keyword usage, avoid over-optimization, and ensure your content naturally covers relevant terms for better search engine understanding.

items.question: What are stop words?
items.answer: Stop words are common words like 'the', 'is', 'and', and 'a' that are typically filtered out during frequency analysis since they do not carry significant meaning.

items.question: Can I customize the word list?
items.answer: Yes, you can add custom words to ignore during analysis, allowing you to focus on meaningful terms and filter out irrelevant or common words.
